description: ColdBean.ai is an AI-powered sales prospecting platform that automates lead enrichment, personalized email outreach, and meeting booking for B2B teams.
overview: ColdBean.ai is an all-in-one outbound platform built for SaaS sales teams and B2B businesses. It replaces multiple point tools by combining data from over 15 sources with automated, hyper-personalized email and LinkedIn campaigns.
what_is: ColdBean.ai is an AI-driven sales outreach tool built for SaaS sales teams and B2B businesses. It automates prospecting, enriches lead data from over 15 sources, and sends hyper-personalized emails at scale. Teams adopt it to push response rates up to 15% and reclaim up to 44 hours per month through its autopilot features, all from a single platform rather than a collection of separate tools.

The platform is strong at finding targeted leads quickly, enriching contact data with AI, and running personalized multi-channel campaigns across email and LinkedIn. Automated outreach and improved email deliverability are available from day one, letting teams start generating meaningful conversations and booked meetings without manual effort. ColdBean.ai plugs into existing CRM and email platforms, covering data enrichment, campaign management, and inbox responses within one GTM stack.
It is not a full CRM or an advanced analytics platform. Its core value is in lead generation, data enrichment, and outreach automation rather than detailed pipeline management or complex reporting.
